notes: Genuine ASB FastNet Statement Export CSV layout (Created date/time; Bank/Branch/Account; From/To date; Avail Bal; Ledger Balance; Date,Unique Id,Tran Type,Cheque Number,Payee,Memo,Amount). Everyday/cheque account. Synthetic data (Bob's Cafe / Acme Inc / Savings). Sourced from dillinger open-source parser test fixtures.
Genuine ASB FastNet tab-delimited (TDV) export layout; same metadata header block and synthetic dataset as export_01 but tab-separated. Sourced from dillinger open-source parser test fixtures.

Genuine ASB FastNet Statement Export CSV layout. Account product shown as 'Staff Streamline' (everyday/transaction). Synthetic transactions (Woolworths NZ; electricity bill payment). Sourced from a public budgeting-app sample folder.

Canonical/normalised 8-column Zera Books 'Xero standard' import schema (transaction_date,description,amount,debit_credit,balance,currency,unique_id,memo) - a reconciled accounting-software import layout, NOT the bank's native online-banking export format. Fully synthetic: 8 rows incl. an opening-balance row (Payroll deposit, Office supplies/Staples inv 88321, Client wire, SaaS subscription, Merchant batch, Rent, Bank service fee); NZD; running balance; debit/credit indicator. Rows are identical across the NZ banks, differing only in the opening balance and the ASB- unique_id prefix. CC BY 4.0, attribution Zera Books.
